if.test: dateStart != null and dateStart != '' and dateEnd != null and dateEnd != ''

where.if: AND l.send_date >= #{dateStart}::DATE AND l.send_date < (#{dateEnd}::DATE + INTERVAL '1 day')

mapper.select: SELECT /* base.ec.cm :: CmhPushLog :: selectById */ l.* , tpl.template_nm AS template_nm , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , cd_pc.code_label AS channel_cd_nm , cd_pr.code_label AS result_cd_nm FROM cmh_push_log l LEFT JOIN sy_template tpl ON tpl.template_id = l.template_id LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = l.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_pc ON cd_pc.code_grp = 'PUSH_CHANNEL' AND cd_pc.code_value = l.channel_cd LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_pr ON cd_pr.code_grp = 'PUSH_RESULT' AND cd_pr.code_value = l.result_cd WHERE l.log_id = #{id}

SELECT /* base.ec.cm :: CmhPushLog :: selectList */ l.* , tpl.template_nm AS template_nm , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , cd_pc.code_label AS channel_cd_nm , cd_pr.code_label AS result_cd_nm FROM cmh_push_log l LEFT JOIN sy_template tpl ON tpl.template_id = l.template_id LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = l.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_pc ON cd_pc.code_grp = 'PUSH_CHANNEL' AND cd_pc.code_value = l.channel_cd LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_pr ON cd_pr.code_grp = 'PUSH_RESULT' AND cd_pr.code_value = l.result_cd
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT /* base.ec.cm :: CmhPushLog :: selectPageList */ l.* , tpl.template_nm AS template_nm , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , cd_pc.code_label AS channel_cd_nm , cd_pr.code_label AS result_cd_nm FROM cmh_push_log l LEFT JOIN sy_template tpl ON tpl.template_id = l.template_id LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = l.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_pc ON cd_pc.code_grp = 'PUSH_CHANNEL' AND cd_pc.code_value = l.channel_cd LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_pr ON cd_pr.code_grp = 'PUSH_RESULT' AND cd_pr.code_value = l.result_cd
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(l.*) /* base.ec.cm :: CmhPushLog :: selectPageCount */ FROM cmh_push_log l
